title: Naming of the Madisonville branch library by governing authority of St. Tammany Parish
doc_html:
§212.2. Naming of the Madisonville branch library by governing authority of St. Tammany Parish

            The governing authority of St. Tammany Parish may name the Madisonville branch library in honor of Peter L. "Pete" Gitz.

            Acts 2017, No. 77, §1.
doc_text:
§212.2.  Naming of the Madisonville branch library by governing authority of St. Tammany
Parish
The governing authority of St. Tammany Parish may name the Madisonville branch
library in honor of Peter L. "Pete" Gitz.
Acts 2017, No. 77, §1.
